name: GLOBOID CELL LEUKODYSTROPHY
definition: KRABBE DISEASE autosomal recessive neurodegenerative disorder characterized by severe myelin loss +
distribution: symmetric hyperintensity / hyperdensity in periventricular white matter, thalami, basal
discriminating_features: symmetric hyperintensity / hyperdensity in periventricular white matter, thalami, basal
brain atrophy with enlargement of ventricles
elevated choline + creatine + myo-inositol associated with moderate N-acetylaspartate

general: symmetric hyperintensity / hyperdensity in periventricular white matter, thalami, basal
brain atrophy with enlargement of ventricles
elevated choline + creatine + myo-inositol associated with moderate N-acetylaspartate

clinical.Prognosis: death within first few years of life
